text:

Note: This patch will require the recently submitted PR
ports/1801​59 which adds a new USES jpeg feature to select
between the 2 jpeg ports.

The above line from PR ports/180175 should have referenced PR
ports/180159.  I have no ideal as to what added the ​ between
the 1801 and 59.
